hausa.set_one_aligned_interval: Saita interval guda ɗaya da aka jera
hausa.n_1_top_unit_corresponds_to: Unit 1 na layin sama yana daidai da
hausa.per_interval_and_the_bottom_line_incre: kowane interval kuma layin ƙasa yana ƙaruwa da
hausa.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Ka shigar da adadi mafi girma da sifili don zaɓuɓɓuka biyu.
hausa.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Zaɓuɓɓuka biyu suna da cost per unit iri ɗaya.
hausa.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A yana da ƙaramin cost per unit.
hausa.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B yana da ƙaramin cost per unit.
hausa.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Ka daidaita ƙimomin domin unit rates biyu su kasance cikin learning-model range.
hausa.rate_outside_model_range: Rate a waje da model range
hausa.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Kwatanta na adalci yana raba kowane cost da adadinsa. Mahallin kuma na iya haɗa da inganci, ɓarna, ko wasu buƙatu.
hausa.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Wannan misali ya wuce iyakar 1000% na learning model. Ka daidaita part ko whole.
hausa.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Wannan sakamako ya wuce iyakar adadin 1,000,000. Ka daidaita ƙimomin misali.
hausa.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: Percent ba a bayyana shi ba lokacin da whole ya zama sifili. Ka shigar da whole tabbatacce don gina tef.
hausa.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: Whole ba a bayyana shi ba lokacin da percent ya zama sifili. Ka shigar da percent tabbatacce don gina tef.
hausa.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Sassa goma masu daidaita, kowanne yana wakiltar 10% na whole ɗaya.
hausa.choose_the_unknown: Zaɓi wanda ba a sani ba
hausa.learning_model_range_0_to_1000_quantit: Learning-model range: 0% zuwa 1000%; adadi har zuwa 1,000,000.
hausa.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Kowane sashe da aka zana daidai 10% na whole ɗaya. Sashe da ya cika ɓangare yana nuna cikakkiyar fraction na wannan 10%.
hausa.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Ka shigar da aƙalla nau'ikan coordinate guda biyu masu inganci, haɗe da ɗaya mai ƙimar x wanda ba sifili ba.
hausa.proportional_the_unit_rate_is_constant: Proportional: unit rate ba ya canzawa.
hausa.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Ba proportional ba: shaidun ba su nuna unit rate guda ɗaya wanda ba ya canzawa kuma yake bi ta origin.
hausa.x_values_comma_separated_2: Ƙimomin x, an raba da waƙafi
hausa.y_values_comma_separated_2: Ƙimomin y, an raba da waƙafi
hausa.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Ka yi amfani da adadi iri ɗaya na ƙimomin x da y. Wannan graph na quadrant na farko yana buƙatar lamba wadda ba korau ba a kowane jere.
hausa.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Ka gyara jerin coordinates kafin yanke shawara game da proportionality:
hausa.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Shaida daga tebur da unit rate
hausa.no_valid_paired_rows_yet: Har yanzu babu jeri masu haɗuwa masu inganci.
hausa.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: An mika ray na proportional model ta origin.
hausa.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Babu cikakken saitin points da za a iya zana graph.
hausa.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Shaidar tebur: dukkan ƙimomin y ÷ x da aka bayyana suna daidai da
hausa.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: points ɗin da aka shigar sun haɗa da (0,0) kuma suna bin ray na model.
hausa.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: ray na model yana mika alaƙar da ba ta canzawa ta (0,0), koda ba a shigar da origin ba.
hausa.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Ka duba ko akwai ƙimomin y ÷ x da suke canzawa, ƙimar y wadda ba sifili ba lokacin da x = 0, ko points da ba su kan layi ɗaya madaidaici da yake bi ta origin.
hausa.enter_an_answer_before_checking: Ka shigar da amsa kafin bincike.
hausa.move_between_representations_and_expla: Ka motsa tsakanin representations kuma ka bayyana alaƙar ninkawa.
hausa.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Mafi kyau don kwatanta na adalci saboda ana sake rubuta kowane yanayi kowane unit ɗaya.
hausa.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Ratio da aka auna gwada whole na 100; yi amfani da part = percent × whole.
hausa.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Layi madaidaici da yake bi ta origin yana nuna multiplier guda ɗaya wanda ba ya canzawa daga x zuwa y.
hausa.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Ka fara ƙiyasi, ka kiyaye units, kuma ka tambaya ko adadi biyu sun canza ta hanyar ninkawa.
